mapper.insert: insert into recruitment (title, mine_salary, max_salary, start_time, end_time, requirement, status, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, detail, user_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{title},#{mineSalary},#{maxSalary},#{startTime},#{endTime},#{requirement}, #{status},#{provinceCode},#{provinceName},#{cityCode},#{cityName}, #{districtCode},#{districtName},#{detail},#{userId},#{createTime},#{updateTime});
mapper.update:
update recruitment
title = #{title},
mine_salary = #{mineSalary},
max_salary = #{maxSalary},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
requirement = #{requirement},
status = #{status},
province_code = #{provinceCode},
province_name = #{provinceName},
city_code = #{cityCode},
city_name = #{cityName},
district_code = #{districtCode},
district_name = #{districtName},
detail = #{detail},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
